tool_args.label: December 2022 Paid Traffic Volume
tool_args.raw_text: For the month of December, 27.1 million paid vehicles crossed B&T facilities, an increase of 4.0% compared to 26.0 million in December 2021.

tool_args.label: December 2022 vs Dec 2021 Traffic Increase
tool_args.raw_text: an increase of 4.0% compared to 26.0 million in December 2021

tool_args.label: E-ZPass Market Share December 2022
tool_args.raw_text: E-ZPass market share was 94.2% in December, 1.0% lower than last year

tool_args.label: November 2022 TBTA Total Paid Traffic
tool_args.raw_text: TBTA's total paid traffic was 26.9 million vehicles, an increase of 0.3% as compared to November 2021 and nearly equivalent to the pre-pandemic traffic in November 2019.

tool_args.label: Best Sustained Customer Safety Trend Since 2015
tool_args.raw_text: TBTA has achieved its best sustained customer safety trend since 2015 with a rate of 3.94 total collisions per million vehicles

tool_args.label: Collisions with Injury Rate
tool_args.raw_text: The collisions-with-injury rate was 0.82 per million vehicles, less than one collision with an injury for every one million crossings.

payload.unit: collisions with injury per million vehicles
payload.raw_value_text: The collisions-with-injury rate was 0.82 per million vehicles

unit_normalized.raw_text: collisions with injury per million vehicles

tool_args.label: Employee Lost Time Injury Rate
tool_args.raw_text: The employee lost time injury rate was 5.5 incidents per 200,000 work hours, lower than both last year and rolling year 2019/2020.

payload.raw_value_text: The employee lost time injury rate was 5.5 incidents per 200,000 work hours

tool_args.label: 2022 Total Collision Rate per Million Vehicles
tool_args.raw_text: The total collision rate per million vehicles was 3.97, 0.4% better than the (3.99) rate in 2021.

tool_args.label: 2022 Collision with Injury Rate per Million Vehicles
tool_args.raw_text: The collision with injury rate continues to be less than one collision per million vehicles from 0.67 in 2021 to 0.82 in 2022.

payload.unit: collisions with injury per million vehicles

unit_normalized.raw_text: collisions with injury per million vehicles

tool_args.label: 2022 Completed Maintenance Work Orders
tool_args.raw_text: In 2022, B&T completed 12,636 work orders, 4.1% more than 2021.

tool_args.label: 2022 Roadway Lights In Service
tool_args.raw_text: In 2022, 98.1% of B&T roadway lights were in service, 0.5% more than 2021.

tool_args.label: 2022 Roadway Striping Replaced
tool_args.raw_text: In 2022, B&T striped 469,170 linear feet of roadway, 20.2% more than 2021 (390,336 linear feet).

tool_args.label: 2022 Storm Drains Cleaned
tool_args.raw_text: B&T cleaned 2,574 drains in 2022 to reduce flooding conditions and increase roadway safety during storm events.

tool_args.label: 2022 LED Lighting Upgrade Percentage
tool_args.raw_text: B&T has upgraded 95% of its lighting to LED.

tool_args.label: Preliminary 2022 traffic volume records
tool_args.raw_text: President DeCrescenzo stated that preliminary overall 2022 numbers indicate potential records for traffic volume, which is good news for reinvestment in TBTA's bridges and tunnels, as well as for providing critical support to mass transit.

payload.claim_text: Preliminary overall 2022 numbers indicate potential records for traffic volume, which is good news for reinvestment in TBTA's bridges and tunnels, as well as for providing critical support to mass transit.
payload.subject: TBTA traffic volume

tool_args.label: ORT momentum with Customer Environment benefits
tool_args.raw_text: President DeCrescenzo discussed how TBTA has continued its 'ORT momentum' by building on Customer Environment benefits such as reduced congestion and improved traffic throughput.

payload.claim_text: TBTA has continued its 'ORT momentum' by building on Customer Environment benefits such as reduced congestion and improved traffic throughput.
payload.subject: Open Road Tolling (ORT) impact

tool_args.label: Record 24-hour toll violator interdiction
tool_args.raw_text: President DeCrescenzo recognized TBTA's Operations, Tolling, Maintenance, and Security teams for a recent, record-breaking 24-hour operation in which TBTA enforcement officers interdicted 29 persistent toll violators (PTVs) who owed a total of nearly half a million dollars in tolls and violation fees

payload.claim_text: TBTA enforcement officers interdicted 29 persistent toll violators (PTVs) who owed a total of nearly half a million dollars in tolls and violation fees and who were driving vehicles with suspended registrations due to toll violations.
payload.subject: TBTA toll enforcement

tool_args.label: Rear-end collisions leading type 2022
tool_args.raw_text: 60.0% of collisions at B&T facilities in 2022 were rear-end collisions, 0.6% higher than 2021 (59.4%).

payload.claim_text: 60.0% of collisions at B&T facilities in 2022 were rear-end collisions, 0.6% higher than 2021 (59.4%).
payload.subject: collision types at B&T facilities

tool_args.label: Following too closely leading collision factor 2022
tool_args.raw_text: In 2022, 'following too closely' accounted for 53.0% of collisions, marking an increase of 7.9% from 45.2% compared to 2020.

payload.claim_text: In 2022, 'following too closely' accounted for 53.0% of collisions, marking an increase of 7.9% from 45.2% compared to 2020.
payload.subject: collision factors at B&T facilities

tool_args.label: Cashless tolling system description
tool_args.raw_text: B&T's cashless tolling system reads E-ZPass tags and captures images of vehicles using equipment attached to gantries above the roadways.

payload.claim_text: B&T's cashless tolling system reads E-ZPass tags and captures images of vehicles using equipment attached to gantries above the roadways.
payload.subject: B&T cashless tolling

tool_args.label: 2022 Toll Roadway Lane Availability
tool_args.raw_text: The overall toll roadway lane availability was 99.88% in 2022.

tool_args.label: 2022 Roadway Sweeping Miles
tool_args.raw_text: B&T swept 13,901 miles of roadway in 2022, 5.9% more than the 13,122 miles swept in 2021.

tool_args.label: 2022 Potholes Repaired
tool_args.raw_text: In 2022, B&T repaired 1,027 potholes, 13.1% less than 2021 (1,182)

tool_args.label: 2022 Roadway Incidents Responded
tool_args.raw_text: B&T responded to 8,223 roadway incidents in 2022.

tool_args.label: 2022 Average Emergency Response Time
tool_args.raw_text: The average emergency response time was 7 minutes and 39 seconds.
